//: Generated by context-engineering skill (dog-food run, 2026-05-10). The 'hooks' block enforces load-bearing rules from CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md as actual guarantees. Hook scripts live in .claude/hooks/. Edit at your own risk; these turn prose into enforcement.
//hooks-source: See .claude/hooks/README.md for what each hook does and why.
//emission-note: block-deploy-cli and block-worktree are not emitted: deploy_target=none and uses_visual_confirmation_gate=false for this repo. Only block-env-commit is universal.
//permissions: Read-only allowlist (Group 2, 2026-06-08). Cuts permission prompts for safe inspection commands. Writes/commits/pushes are intentionally NOT here. check/build/test entries omitted: this repo's commands are all 'none'. Grow with fewer-permission-prompts.

PreToolUse.//: Hook: block-env-commit. matcher=Bash; the script reads the stdin payload and blocks only staging of .env files. No 'if' filter — scoping lives in the script (see .claude/hooks/README.md). Always emitted.

hooks.//: Hook: validate-skills. Blocks `git commit` when any skills/*/SKILL.md has malformed frontmatter or a duplicate name. Bare Bash matcher; scoping lives in the script. Fails open when no SKILL.md is found. Crib C-27 / D-017.
